programme.title: E473
programme.desc: DREAMSCAPES, ARCHITECTURAL WONDERS: From simple residential cottage, impressive royal mansion to magnificent skyscraper, behind those bricks and steel structure, it is the historical and cultural designs that make them immortal. This program shows the great architectures and how they inspire us in various ways.

programme.desc: TOP VIEW: High precision observation of space security and insight into the changes of the global situation. Travel through time and space and perceive the dimension of geography.

programme.title: E130
programme.desc: “We Are One” uses a documentary shooting method, from the perspective of people, animals, and nature living in harmony, tells a touching story of cross-species, highlighting the noble sentiments of purity and kindness. As the sons of the earth, we are in harmony with nature, and all things coexist with love. From January 21, 2023, Phoenix Chinese Channel will launch a weekly documentary program of human and animals “We Are One” with a total duration of 26 minutes.

programme.title: E1 - Emperor Penguins
programme.desc: Andy takes Kip on a wild adventure to see emperor penguins in Antarctica. He huddles up in a group of penguins to try and stay warm, and even finds a cosy spot under one of the parents.

programme.title: E2 - Rhyming Lurgy
programme.desc: In this episode the new pirates Sandy and Seaweed have caught the rhyming lurgy of the Ancient Mariner and can only speak in rhyme!

programme.title: E4 - Squash
programme.desc: When dad and Uncle Stripe play a game of squash, Bluey and Bingo are in control of their every move, and Bingo proves that big siblings don't always beat little siblings.

programme.title: E6 - Stumpfest
programme.desc: Dad and his mates hit the backyard, ready to rip up some tree stumps! But when Bluey and Bingo take over a stump as a nail salon, Dad finds he's got some negotiating to do.

programme.title: E4 - Veg-O-Vision Song Contest
programme.desc: Supertato and the Tato Team must battle to save Tato Tower from Evil Pea's earth-shaking stomping performance at the Veg-O-Vision Song Contest.

programme.title: E2 - The Face Painting Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone who looks like Enid, only much too big. Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid!

programme.title: E3 - The Transport Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. The Squirrels take an epic journey to give it back.

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E16 - Phones
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurants with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: E26 - Scooter Stand Still
programme.desc: Scooter Boy gets his confidence knocked after a small accident, so Sarah & Duck help him to get it back.

programme.title: E5 - Operation Jewel
programme.desc: Evil Pea steals Tomato's precious jewel. Supertato ventures to get it back by secretly lifting the jewel from Evil Pea's crown and defeating a crowd of rampaging Mini Peas.

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E8 - Venice, Italy
programme.desc: The Go Jetters get a sinking feeling when Glitch turns the canals of Venice into roads.

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E3 - The Transport Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. The Squirrels take an epic journey to give it back.

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Mysterious White Coral
programme.desc: The lab of Australian scientists inspecting the cause of the devastating coral reef bleaching epidemic has suffered a series of late-night robberies. And this is seriously interfering with their research.

programme.title: Tunnel
programme.desc: An undersea waterfall hides a mysterious tunnel behind it. As the Nektons explore it, they find not everything is as it should be.

programme.title: Reduce Screen Time
programme.desc: The Grimwades decide to reduce screen time by taking a screen break. With their devices stored away in a cardboard box, they go to a sensory garden and experience the here and now by using each of their five senses one by one.

programme.title: Super Shape!
programme.desc: Eric learns why the triangle is such an important shape for building. He builds a bridge made of straws that is so strong that he can balance several books on it.

programme.title: Make or Break
programme.desc: It's a busy week for our Ice Stars. Charlie and Freddie have tryouts for a different sort of ice sport. Meanwhile, the Icicles are taking a break from their busy schedule and having some fun off the ice. And Asiyah is waiting for an important call.

programme.title: Fart Rocket!
programme.desc: Could farts power a rocket? And Gladiator Dynamite tests Dr Dan and Dr Raph's dunking skills in an epic Body Battle!

programme.title: Kiwifruit Valley Christmas
programme.desc: When a Christmas Eve storm wrecks the festive preparations of our harried squabbling team they remember how important their friendship is and work together to create a Christmas celebration that may not be perfect but is full of aroha.

programme.title: Rise Up!
programme.desc: Eric learns that yeast is used to make bread rise and that it produces gases when it feeds on sugar. He does an experiment with a balloon to show how this works.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: Lord and Peasant
programme.desc: Our humble peasant friend Howler can't wait for his next batch of pretzels! However, in the Middle Ages, the feudal system is ruthless, the lord always helping himself to a share of the peasant's yield. And, quite often, all that's left is a few meager crumbs!

programme.title: Coffee Filter
programme.desc: Who says coffee is the only thing filters are used for? See how we turn this day to day object into something fun.

programme.title: Day of the Werewolf
programme.desc: Gavin turns up at the flat, but Ricky thinks there is something a bit strange about his mate. After making a moon catcher with ice and a monster foot pencil holder, they use a light stick to make out-of-this-world digital art.

programme.title: Cellphone Inventor
programme.desc: Host Alie Ward presents inflatable fish that swim through the air, the inventor of the phone in your pocket, smart cooking pans and a drone that clears landmines in war zones.

programme.title: Are Hot Springs Magical?
programme.desc: The Grand Prismatic Spring of Yellowstone National Park in the USA is a rainbow coloured hot spring. The colours are caused by heat loving organisms known as Cyanobacteria and various other bacteria and organisms which contain different types of coloured chemicals.

programme.title: The Biggest Kite
programme.desc: Oto takes his cousin to the park, and the kids all build kites. When it gets windy, they realise the biggest kite isn't always the best.

programme.title: Reuse Cardboard Boxes
programme.desc: The Grimwades come to a historic castle for the day. They decide to reuse cardboard boxes and make a play castle. The family goes in search of boxes and finds some at the ice-cream shop. They ask if they can reuse them and the children start to build a castle.

programme.title: Brilliant Body Temperature
programme.desc: There is a snake in the lab as Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand explore how body temperature works. And new twin doctors Dan and Raph bust some urban myths about how to stay healthy.

programme.title: The Wildlife Hospital
programme.desc: Poppy, the cat, needs urgent dental surgery before she finds a new home. Hundreds of chickens get a bath, and at the wildlife hospital, the Junior Vets treat a rabbit with an injured leg and some baby starlings who have lost their mum.

programme.title: Coffee Filter
programme.desc: Who says coffee is the only thing filters are used for? See how we turn this day to day object into something fun.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: E4 - Hot Rods and Speed Boats
programme.desc: The King Of The North drag race kicks off with Billy scrambling to prepare his hotrod for its race against Chris and the Jet Truck, in a challenge that will see the loser facing public humiliation.

programme.title: E4 - Journey Back
programme.desc: The team battle a flash flood, save rusting equipment and deal with a team member's drug problem. A valuable diamond is found - the biggest to date.

programme.title: E4 - Melting Ice
programme.desc: Do we still have a chance to stop the ice from melting?

programme.title: E1 - Sarah Gets Good News
programme.desc: After the success of her first restaurant in Goa, India, former Masterchef contestant Sarah Todd steps up to the challenge of opening a second restaurant, The Wine Rack in the heart of the urban metropolis, Mumbai.

programme.title: E2 - Kitchen Isn't Ready
programme.desc: Seeking inspiration for her menu, Sarah immerses herself in Mumbai’s thriving street food scene. Meanwhile delays on the new restaurant kitchen are putting the team behind schedule.

programme.title: E8 - Terry vs Gorn
programme.desc: Captain James T Kirk’s battle with the Gorn alien is one of the most popular episodes from the original series. He defeats the Gorn by creating gunpowder from the base elements found on the planet. We partner with Star Trek: Original Series set tour in New York, as we test the reality of making gunpowder by hand without actually blowing yourself up.

programme.desc: The team battle a flash flood, save rusting equipment and deal with a team member's drug problem. A valuable diamond is found - the biggest to date.

programme.title: E4 - Dying Hard
programme.desc: John McLain (Bruce Willis) finds himself dangling from the side of a building. The only way to save himself is to shoot through the glass window and break through to safety. Using the same Beretta 92 handgun, we reconstruct the office glass and see if our host can break through.

programme.title: E8 - Terry vs Gorn
programme.desc: Captain James T Kirk’s battle with the Gorn alien is one of the most popular episodes from the original series. He defeats the Gorn by creating gunpowder from the base elements found on the planet. We partner with Star Trek: Original Series set tour in New York, as we test the reality of making gunpowder by hand without actually blowing yourself up.

programme.title: E1 - Rollercoaster Renovation
programme.desc: Heide Park Soltau, a german adventure park, offers adrenaline junkies many attractions and rides. The biggest crowd puller is the Colossos wooden roller coaster - the highest and fastest wooden roller coaster in Europe. But over twenty million passengers in fifteen years are taking their toll. The ride closes temporarily and renovation work begins. It is a gigantic task - 1500 metres of track have to be renewed. A complete replacement of all wooden rails has never been done on a comparable facility before. It is a renovation of superlatives for 12.5 million euros. The team is working with the heavy components at heights of up to 60 metres. Safety technology and its correct application are vital. The reopening date is approaching and the pressure is mounting.

Yakap: Pagninilay Sa Mga Turo Ng Simbahan
programme.desc: A two-hour Holy Week special features Cardinal Luis Antonio Tagle, Bishop Broderick Pabillo, and Dr. Cielo Magno urging viewers to live out their faith by recognizing human dignity, confronting injustice and corruption, and acting with courage.

programme.title: Reel Life Weekend 'Sakada'
programme.desc: A social-realist drama about the harsh lives and struggles of seasonal sugarcane workers (“sakadas”) in Negros and the exploitative plantation system they endure.

programme.title: Tunay Na Buhay
programme.desc: Pia Arcanghel takes you on a journey of hope, courage, and determination; real people, real stories providing you with real inspiration.

programme.title: E307 - Learning To Fly / Queen Swiper
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Dulce the Dragon learn to fly so she can reach her parents at Cloudy Caves. // After La Reina and Swiper's bodies were switched by Big Red Chicken's magic, Dora and Boots help them switch back!

programme.title: E423 - Pottery
programme.desc: Mrs Zebra teaches Peppa, George, Zoe, Zaza and Zuzu Zebra how to make a real tea set from clay.

programme.title: E501 - Potato City
programme.desc: Peppa and her family visit a new theme park that has a vegetable theme.

programme.title: E105 - Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: E608 - The Sandpit
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are busy building a desert island in a sandpit. They are all very proud of it, with its forest, lake, houses, and shops.

programme.title: E303 - The Crew Builds A Sea Wall
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose asks Rubble & Crew to fix the bridge to Bear Island. But when Speed Meister intervenes, the pups have to clean up his mess and protect the bears from a rapidly approaching storm... with help from Auntie Crane's new Bark Yard Zoomer!

programme.title: E304 - The Crew Builds A Super Mega Movie Screen / The Crew Builds An Auntie Day P
programme.desc: A new Super Squirrely Whirly movie is playing at the drive-in theater! But when Speed Meister gets in the way, the pups spring into action to save the day. // It's Auntie Day! But can the pups finish building their present for Auntie Crane in time?

programme.title: E113 - The Perfect Dinner / The Kittens
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: E1103 - Pups Plus A Plucky Chicken / Pups Save A Pet Show
programme.desc: When Humdinger, intent on building the world's largest corn maze, steals Farmer Al's super-powered seeds. // Today is Adventure Bay's 'Twin It To win It' pet show, where owners and their pets dress in matching outfits.

programme.title: E221 - The Crew Builds A Winter Wonderland / The Crew Builds A Giant Snow Squirrel
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew work together to transform Builder Cove's beach boardwalk into a bright, festive winter wonderland. // When a snow day gets in the way of Motor & Mix's Super Squirrely Whirly plans, Rubble & Crew do what they do best... build!

programme.title: E105 - Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: E851 - Mandy Mouse's Birthday
programme.desc: Mandy Mouse has a birthday visit to a cheese theme park with Peppa and her friends. Everything in the park is cheese-themed - Mandy loves cheese!

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 女急救醫生杏野朱羅(松本若菜)有著出色的醫療技術，甚至能夠同時為兩名重症患者進行高難度手術，以致被稱為「阿修羅醫生」，她從不考慮醫院的利益，亦不會顧忌上級，只會專注拯救眼前的患者，即使對方身無分文又或者是黑道成員，都堅信要絕對幫助他們！

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 故事從東京發生的一連串慘烈連環殺人案展開，而案件現場讓兩名記者的命運交織在一起。設樂浩暉（志尊淳）是週刊雜誌的知名自由撰稿人，筒井萬琴則是電視台新聞節目導播（岸井雪乃），敏銳且富有正義感。兩人因追蹤同一起案件而相識，並在攜手調查的過程中逐漸被彼此吸引。然而，隨著調查的深入，浩暉的身分卻越來越可疑，他的過去與案件的關聯也逐漸浮出水面──他，究竟是無辜的旁觀者，還是那個令人聞風喪膽的連環殺人犯？

programme.title: Les observateurs
programme.desc: Une émission réalisée à partir de contenus amateurs : photos ou vidéos, tout vient des observateurs du monde entier. Les contenus sont vérifiés par la rédaction de la chaîne.

programme.title: Le Paris des arts
programme.desc: Une balade culturelle dans Paris en compagnie d'un invité. Avec des sujets présentés des ponts d'un art à un autre, d'un artiste à l'autre, de la France au reste du monde.

programme.title: Culture prime
programme.desc: Des vidéos culturelles regroupées sous un label et une identité visuelle commune et avec la même ligne éditoriale : raconter l'actualité via le prisme de la culture.

programme.title: Plan B
programme.desc: Découverte d'initiatives concrètes et innovantes en matière d'écologie, d'économie circulaire, de transition énergétique, et de consommation responsable.

programme.title: Billet retour
programme.desc: Les reporters de France 24 reviennent dans des villes oubliées qui ont fait la Une de l'actualité. Comment vit-on dans les villes traumatisées par une guerre, une catastrophe naturelle ou un désastre industriel ?

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: Les observateurs
programme.desc: Une émission réalisée à partir de contenus amateurs : photos ou vidéos, tout vient des observateurs du monde entier. Les contenus sont vérifiés par la rédaction de la chaîne.

programme.title: La semaine de l'éco
programme.desc: Stéphanie Antoine décrypte avec ses invités l'actualité économique internationale de la semaine.

programme.title: Le Paris des arts
programme.desc: Une balade culturelle dans Paris en compagnie d'un invité. Avec des sujets présentés des ponts d'un art à un autre, d'un artiste à l'autre, de la France au reste du monde.

programme.title: Culture prime

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Drama Serial 'The Scent Of The Wind' Week 1
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Project X: The Challengers-New Beginnings The High-Speed Train That Revived The UK
programme.desc: Project X returns for the first time in 18 years. The former series featured people involved in project related to the Japanese industry and contemporary history. The new series focuses on people in the “Lost Era” following the collapse of the bubble economy. In every era, there are always those take on challenges. Even without receiving praise or being in the spotlight, some dedicate themselves to their work. The documentary delivers passion and courage right to you.

E4 - Downward Spiral
programme.desc: Johnny and Carmen's romance flies high while Daniel and Amanda are rattled by Terry's schemes. The teens' feuds spill over at the waterpark.

programme.title: E8 - Taikai
programme.desc: A coveted spot in an elite international tournament ignites a fight between dojos. Tory's loyalties are tested. Sam struggles to let Miguel go.

programme.title: E8 - Molting
programme.desc: Johnny prepares his Cobra Kai students for the next All Valley Karate Tournament and in turn, he is inspired to clean up his life. Daniel is still unaware of his new pupil's background.

programme.title: E6 - Take A Right
programme.desc: Daniel's students are given a lesson in overcoming their grudges. Johnny spends some time away from the dojo, while Kreese exerts his influence.

programme.title: E9 - Pulpo
programme.desc: Johnny cautiously takes a stab at love, while Daniel and Amanda enjoy a romantic date night. An attempt to bring the students of the two dojos together backfires as hostilities between the teens escalate.

programme.title: E4 - Downward Spiral
programme.desc: Johnny and Carmen's romance flies high while Daniel and Amanda are rattled by Terry's schemes. The teens' feuds spill over at the waterpark.

programme.title: E309 - Chaos Unchained
programme.desc: The Ninja hurry to the First Land to stop the Forbidden Five from freeing ThunderFang, and Wyldfyre discovers a drastic cure to Roby's decay.

programme.title: E148 - The Pact/The Faith
programme.desc: Gumball finds Penny's laugh annoying, but can't think of a way to tell her without offending her. When he discovers that Principal Brown has the same problem with Miss Simian's morning breath, they decide to swap problems to save themselves from getting dumped.

programme.title: E162 - Looney Tunes Cartoons Valentine's Extwavaganza/Bugs Bunny's Howl-O-Skreem Sppoktacula
programme.desc: It's love, Looney Tunes style!

programme.title: E123 - Squash Me If You Can
programme.desc: Sweetie competes in a cat vs. bird competition but faces pressure to win at all costs. Hamton and Babs go into soccer mom-mode cheering her on, while Plucky, at the Loo Bru, takes over Dizzy’s shift to prove he’s more selfless than Buster.

programme.title: E64 - The Gift/The Apprentice/The Check/The Pest/The Hug
programme.desc: After they receive an extravagant invitation to Masami's birthday party, Gumball and Darwin are anxious to find just the right gift for her. However, they're not the only ones: it turns out every kid in Elmore is competing to get Masami the perfect present. When Gumball and Darwin decide to think outside the box, their unusual gift is a big surprise, but not a good one.

programme.title: E309 - Chaos Unchained
programme.desc: The Ninja hurry to the First Land to stop the Forbidden Five from freeing ThunderFang, and Wyldfyre discovers a drastic cure to Roby's decay.

programme.title: E10 - A. Snowman Cometh/Bad Hair Day/Fishy Business/Angry Nasty People/Courage Meets Big Fo
programme.desc: Muriel, Courage and the Farmer are vacationing in the Arctic. Under the threat of global warming, an evil snowman tries to save himself by stealing the human 'anti-melting' gene from them.

programme.title: E448 - Remote Control Chaos/Fitness Instructor
programme.desc: Mr Bean drives a remote-controlled car straight into a birthday cake and tries to keep it secret!

programme.title: E202 - Train Ride Snack
programme.desc: On a train trip, Tuffy dives into Tom’s lunch, sparking chaos. With Jerry’s help, they escape, leading to chases across tourist spots, snapshots along the way, and a final nap as the trio end their wild day together.

programme.title: E174 - Pearl Of My Dreams/ Bugs Hole Gags 2: Down The Drain/ Mech-A-Mess/Boarding Games/ Put
programme.desc: Porky and Daffy go diving for pearls. Elmer Fudd has a hunting mishap. Wile E. Coyote gets a new suit.

programme.title: E10 - A. The Sock/The Genius
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are taught confusing lessons about honesty by the school councillor.

programme.title: E202 - Train Ride Snack
programme.desc: On a train trip, Tuffy dives into Tom’s lunch, sparking chaos. With Jerry’s help, they escape, leading to chases across tourist spots, snapshots along the way, and a final nap as the trio end their wild day together.

programme.title: Looney Tunes: Rabbit's Run -Looney Tunes: Rabbits Run
programme.desc: Bugs Bunny is in for the ride of his life when he picks up a perfume salesgirl, Lola Bunny, who inadvertently created an invisibility spray. Now the whole world is on their tails!

programme.title: E147 - Green Wing/15 Minutes of Fame/Splitsville/Clawdad/You’re a Good Man, Mojo Jojo
programme.desc: When volunteering at a retirement home, Buttercup meets an old woman who claims she used to be a superhero.

programme.title: E64 - The Gift/The Apprentice/The Check/The Pest/The Hug
programme.desc: After they receive an extravagant invitation to Masami's birthday party, Gumball and Darwin are anxious to find just the right gift for her. However, they're not the only ones: it turns out every kid in Elmore is competing to get Masami the perfect present. When Gumball and Darwin decide to think outside the box, their unusual gift is a big surprise, but not a good one.

programme.title: E21 - Trouble At Smelt Fishing/Lunch Time Is Quiet Time/Welcome To The Space/Deca Wants To
programme.desc: Traces of the Bobobobobone are detected on fish scales by the lake. When Shiro arrives at the frozen lake, he drills a hole in it and competes with Deca at smelt-fishing.

programme.title: E7 - Death Punchies/It's Time/Muscle Mentor/World's Best Boss/Bachelor Party! Zingo!!
programme.desc: Tired of Mordecai always beating him at punchies and getting his way, Rigby decides to learn the martial art of 'Death Kwon Do'.

programme.title: E147 - Green Wing/15 Minutes of Fame/Splitsville/Clawdad/You’re a Good Man, Mojo Jojo
programme.desc: When volunteering at a retirement home, Buttercup meets an old woman who claims she used to be a superhero.

programme.title: Looney Tunes: Rabbit's Run -Looney Tunes: Rabbits Run
programme.desc: Bugs Bunny is in for the ride of his life when he picks up a perfume salesgirl, Lola Bunny, who inadvertently created an invisibility spray. Now the whole world is on their tails!

programme.title: E64 - The Gift/The Apprentice/The Check/The Pest/The Hug
programme.desc: After they receive an extravagant invitation to Masami's birthday party, Gumball and Darwin are anxious to find just the right gift for her. However, they're not the only ones: it turns out every kid in Elmore is competing to get Masami the perfect present. When Gumball and Darwin decide to think outside the box, their unusual gift is a big surprise, but not a good one.

programme.title: E123 - Squash Me If You Can
programme.desc: Sweetie competes in a cat vs. bird competition but faces pressure to win at all costs. Hamton and Babs go into soccer mom-mode cheering her on, while Plucky, at the Loo Bru, takes over Dizzy’s shift to prove he’s more selfless than Buster.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: Kampung Foodsteps is about to embark on a homecoming journey with Darren(Wen Jie) and guests to explore the local delicacies and immerse in the rich local culture.

programme.title: E5 - The Chicken Rice Battle
programme.desc: Hainanese chicken rice, one of Singapore's national dishes, was popularized by the famous Swee Kee Chicken Rice at Middle Road in the 1950s and 1960s.

programme.title: E1 - The Ang Ku Kueh Battle
programme.desc: Ji Xiang Confectionery is one of the oldest and most popular ang ku kueh sellers in Singapore,with faithful crowds thronging its Everton Park shop over the last 35 years.

programme.title: E9 - On The Niigata Road 1
programme.desc: In Niigata, we started our trip from Murakami City in Kaetsu. We tried miso ramen and katsudon in Drive-in Fuji.

programme.title: E2 - Huang Biren, Yao Wen Long, Zong Zijie, Hong Ling
programme.desc: The main cast of Your World in Mine have come together once again as Chris Lee's guests in this episode.

programme.desc: Marion Grasby explores the deep cultural and emotional ties that make certain dishes so satisfying, reflecting on how food carries the stories of where we've been.

programme.title: My Near-Death Experience - My New Beginning
programme.desc: What does dying feel like? What is it like to stand on the threshold of death - and turn back? Three young women talk about their near-death experiences and how these moments changed their lives.

programme.title: The Haydn Expedition, Part 1
programme.desc: Is Joseph Haydn's music boring? Not at all, say Paavo Jaervi and the musicians of the Deutsche Kammerphilharmonie Bremen. On their musical journey through Haydn's symphonic works, they discover new and surprising things.

programme.title: How Passengers Can Calm Nerves Or Cause Chaos
programme.desc: Some passengers aren't just along for the ride - and can have a huge influence on their driver! Plus: the new Kia Sportage gets more than a facelift.

programme.title: Under Taliban Control - Cricket Brings Hope To Divided Afghanistan
programme.desc: Afghanistan has become one of the world's top cricket nations, bringing hope to a country reeling from decades of crisis. The return of the Taliban means this development can only be celebrated by half the population - but Afghan women in exile are using cricket to resist. We join young players Jamal Stanikzai and Firooza Amiri, and national team player Gulbadin Naib, on a global cricket journey.

programme.title: Mental Health: Ill Or Just Wired Differently?
programme.desc: Is a lack of concentration a sign of ADHD? Is a spell of feeling down actually depression? In Good Shape looks at mental health and neurodiversity.

programme.title: We Are Science
programme.desc: Even though there has been tremendous progress in the number of women participating in higher education, women and girls make up only a minority in science. They are still often directed away from science subjects growing up, limiting their preparation and opportunities to go into these fields as adults. That needs to change.

programme.title: The Haydn Expedition, Part 1
programme.desc: Is Joseph Haydn's music boring? Not at all, say Paavo Jaervi and the musicians of the Deutsche Kammerphilharmonie Bremen. On their musical journey through Haydn's symphonic works, they discover new and surprising things.

programme.title: Under Taliban Control - Cricket Brings Hope To Divided Afghanistan

We join young players Jamal Stanikzai and Firooza Amiri, and national team player Gulbadin Naib, on a global cricket journey.

programme.title: The Gothic Mystery - When Cathedrals Reached Up To The Heavens
programme.desc: Gothic architecture emerged in France in the 12th century. This architectural style revolutionized church construction, creating cathedrals that soared skywards. But where did the knowledge and technology for building these monuments come from?

programme.title: We Are Science
programme.desc: Even though there has been tremendous progress in the number of women participating in higher education, women and girls make up only a minority in science. They are still often directed away from science subjects growing up, limiting their preparation and opportunities to go into these fields as adults. That needs to change.

We join young players Jamal Stanikzai and Firooza Amiri, and national team player Gulbadin Naib, on a global cricket journey.

programme.title: From The King Of Rice To The Queen Of Diy
programme.desc: In this episode, presenter Palesa Tembe is at the SA Fashion Week. Plus, the king of rice, Nigerian jollof, handcrafted bicycles from Namibia and the South African DIY queen Amantle Tshweu.

programme.desc: Is a lack of concentration a sign of ADHD? Is a spell of feeling down actually depression? In Good Shape looks at mental health and neurodiversity.

programme.title: Build Resilience: Climate-Conscious Cities, Homes And Coasts
programme.desc: Ancient sand dunes protect Tamil Nadu, urban planners design cities to be a shield against extreme weather. Plus: Building cyclone-resilient, sustainable homes.

programme.title: How Passengers Can Calm Nerves Or Cause Chaos
programme.desc: Some passengers aren't just along for the ride - and can have a huge influence on their driver! Plus: the new Kia Sportage gets more than a facelift.

programme.desc: Is a lack of concentration a sign of ADHD? Is a spell of feeling down actually depression? In Good Shape looks at mental health and neurodiversity.

programme.title: The Gothic Mystery - When Cathedrals Reached Up To The Heavens
programme.desc: Gothic architecture emerged in France in the 12th century. This architectural style revolutionized church construction, creating cathedrals that soared skywards. But where did the knowledge and technology for building these monuments come from?

programme.title: Build Resilience: Climate-Conscious Cities, Homes And Coasts
programme.desc: Ancient sand dunes protect Tamil Nadu, urban planners design cities to be a shield against extreme weather. Plus: Building cyclone-resilient, sustainable homes.

programme.title: The Haydn Expedition, Part 1
programme.desc: Is Joseph Haydn's music boring? Not at all, say Paavo Jaervi and the musicians of the Deutsche Kammerphilharmonie Bremen. On their musical journey through Haydn's symphonic works, they discover new and surprising things.

programme.title: Build Resilience: Climate-Conscious Cities, Homes And Coasts
programme.desc: Ancient sand dunes protect Tamil Nadu, urban planners design cities to be a shield against extreme weather. Plus: Building cyclone-resilient, sustainable homes.

programme.title: Under Taliban Control - Cricket Brings Hope To Divided Afghanistan
programme.desc: Afghanistan has become one of the world's top cricket nations, bringing hope to a country reeling from decades of crisis. The return of the Taliban means this development can only be celebrated by half the population - but Afghan women in exile are using cricket to resist. We join young players Jamal Stanikzai and Firooza Amiri, and national team player Gulbadin Naib, on a global cricket journey.

programme.title: How Passengers Can Calm Nerves Or Cause Chaos

programme.title: Mental Health: Ill Or Just Wired Differently?
programme.desc: Is a lack of concentration a sign of ADHD? Is a spell of feeling down actually depression? In Good Shape looks at mental health and neurodiversity.

programme.title: E248 - The Krusty Bucket / Squid's on a Bus
programme.desc: Plankton creates a clone of himself and Mr. Krabs, but neither restaurant is safe from the newcomer. // Squidward gleefully switches jobs with a bus driver for an easy ride... until SpongeBob and Patrick climb aboard.

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E112 - Prank U Next
programme.desc: Max seeks help dealing with a mystery prankster at school from his old principal, who was always the target of his pranks. But Max fails to stop the pranks and quits the mission, prompting Chloe to confess that she was the prankster all along.

programme.title: E311 - Ray Forgives
programme.desc: Ray breaks up with Credenza, giving Danger Force only 48 hours to teach Ray how to forgive before his relationship is over forever. If Ray wants a future with Credenza, he must confront his past and learn to forgive his greatest enemy, Drex.

programme.title: E208 - Freaky Fri-Day-Day
programme.desc: A face-swap app causes Lay Lay and Sadie to switch bodies, forcing both girls to live a day in the other's shoes before they can resolve the issue.

programme.title: E195 - SpongeBob LongPants

programme.title: E505 - The Great Cactus Con
programme.desc: Jasper gets the chance to take his crush to Cactus Con. When a mysterious villain gets involved the entire gang is forced into action!

programme.title: E249 - Sandy's Nutty Nieces / Insecurity Guards

programme.title: Spread Your Wings
programme.desc: A teenager and his father go the Arctic circle to guide endangered geese on a new migratory path.

programme.title: The Dancer
programme.desc: Loïe Fuller, the toast of the Folies Bergères, had a complicated relationship with her protégé and rival Isadora Duncan.

programme.title: Evil Does Not Exist
programme.desc: A small rural village and a developer face off over a planned glamping facility.

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 本劇以患病少女何冉在生命最後階段學習生活、情感經歷與個人成長為線，講述她在遇到有著難以釋懷過往、幾乎對未來人生失去信心的傑出園藝家蕭寒後，兩人經過一系列誤打誤撞的、溫馨浪漫的奇妙際遇後，從彼此身上尋回各自生命中最重要卻曾經缺失的部分，重拾對生活的信心和希望，也收穫刻骨銘心愛情的故事。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 侯文詠原著小說改編，兩段糾結的情感，交織出一場關於「選擇」的情愛旅程。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 《愛很美味》講述了三位個性迥異、特色鮮明的都市麗人，在經歷了一系列創業的艱辛，職場的壓迫，和感情的波折後，對生活、事業和愛情都有了重新的認識。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E3 - Unusual Museums
programme.desc: Among the two hundred museums in the city of Paris, some are more confidential than others and belong to brands, associations, or private collectors. Yvan Hallouin explores the most surprising of them.

programme.title: E19 - Charente-Maritime Special Programme
programme.desc: Sebastien Lys uses eye and ear to fish for mullet; Brice Thomas shares his passion for producing salt. Collecting ray eggs with the association IODDE. Raphael Musseau, doctor in ecology, and Jean-Claude Barbraud, ornithologist at the Museum National d'Histoire Naturelle, follow white storks. Plus a visit to Marans.

programme.title: E4 - Taro, The Polynesians' Tuber
programme.desc: Taro, long a staple food in the Polynesian islands, is still cultivated today in every archipelago. In the Australs, its cultivation is the most intensive: taro fields are an integral part of the inhabitants' daily lives.

programme.title: E11 - The Designer Wales Bonner
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: E10 - With Martin Charlier
programme.desc: On the menu: onion and goat cheese-stuffed date salad plus beef carbonnade with gueuze beer and chicory.

programme.title: E33 - Chevilly - Chamerolles
programme.desc: Near Orleans, the Chevilly castle reveals its elegant silhouette in the natural region of Beauce. Between the Middle Ages and the Renaissance, luxurious baths and captivating fragrances... At the Chamerolles castle, history blends with the scents of the 18th century.

programme.title: E1 - The Thyssen-Bornemisza Museum, Madrid, Classical Painting
programme.desc: A journey through time with the private collection accumulated by the Thyssen-Bornemisza family of German industrialists, specialists in steel manufacturing. In pride of place: the great classical French painters including Vouet, Watteau, Robert, Vernet, Gericault, Delacroix...

programme.title: E3 - How Long To Die In Cold
programme.desc: With shoddy evidence collection and bad police work exposed at trial, Karen's legal team suggests that someone may have killed John inside the house.

programme.title: E2 - How Does It Work?!
programme.desc: Blippi is wondering, 'How does it work?!' Join Blippi & his robot buddy FETCH on an adventure to find the answers! Blippi shrinks down to fly inside a beehive & learn how honey is made, & explores a garbage truck to find out why flies love it so much. Then, it’s a trip through a factory to see how chocolate is made! The adventure even travels through time as Blippi meets his great-grandpa to see the very first cars. Plus, Blippi & FETCH help a nervous crane learn to build a skyscraper!

programme.title: E1 - Battling Evil Robots & Racing Villains!
programme.desc: Get ready for an action-packed day of battling evil robots & racing villains! First, the new & improved Robofreeze becomes faulty, & Mila & Morphle must help Officer Freeze retrieve the remote to turn him off! Then, it's time for the Pet Port Rally, but naughty Winston cheats by using sneaky devices to slow everyone down. The chaos continues as two Robofreezes turn evil & multiply, & a lightning strike turns another one into a super-powered menace!

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a nature walk & some of his favorite rhymes! First, JJ's family shows him all the fun things we can do to help the Earth, like sorting trash for recycling. Then, the kids go on a nature walk with Bingo, collecting fun information in their scrapbooks! After the outdoor fun, it's time for classic rhymes. Sing along as ten animal friends try to share a bed & help the three little kittens who have lost their mittens!

programme.title: E6 - Fun Adventures & Sleepy Songs!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some fun adventures & sleepy songs! First, help Twinkle find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make along the way! Then, Bunny leads Twinkle on an exciting adventure into the forest to find a mysterious box. After a long day of playing, it's time for some sleepy songs. Listen as Mr. Moon sings a soothing lullaby to help Twinkle drift off to sleep for a peaceful night's rest.

programme.title: E2 - A Calming Night with Twinkle!
programme.desc: Have a calming & magical night with Twinkle the star! When Bao Bao struggles to sleep, Twinkle arrives & transforms into a hot air balloon to lift her cot into the night sky so she can see the moon. Then, she helps Max, Muffin & Bao Bao get ready for bed by transforming into a cuddly teddy bear to give them all warm goodnight hugs. From creating a magical rainbow over the bath to turning into a kite for a gentle ride, Twinkle always makes bedtime magical.

programme.title: E3 - JJ's Splashin' Jungle Jams!
programme.desc: Get your dancing shoes ready for JJ's Splashin' Jungle Jams! The party starts at the beach with a fun game of freeze dance on the sand. Then, dive deep under the sea to learn the ABCs with jellyfish & shark friends & swim like a beautiful mermaid! The adventure continues deep in the jungle where you can dance with gorillas, snakes & crocodiles. From popping bubbles to doing a silly animal dance, it's a wild party at the beach & in the jungle!

programme.title: E1 - JJ's Yummy Food & Clean-Up Fun!
programme.desc: It's a day of yummy food & clean-up fun with JJ! First, learn about all types of pasta & make some from scratch in Grandma's kitchen. Then, Cody's Dad shows how fun & tasty healthy eating can be with delicious sliced fruit. After all the fun, it's time to clean up! JJ's family gives Bingo a scrub in the tub after he gets dirty playing outside, & all the kids chip in to wash a filthy firetruck. It's fun to make a mess, & even more fun to clean up!

programme.title: E2 - Bourbon, Barrels And Burgoo
programme.desc: A very pregnant Gail Simmons asks the chefs to feed her cravings in a special Quickfire delivery. Then it’s time to celebrate two iconic Kentucky mainstays: local cuisine and bourbon. The Chefs head to Makers Mark, the oldest distillery in America to put their spins on a meal full of Kentucky classics including burgoo, Benedictine, mutton, hoe cakes and dumplings. This is a true battle for Kentucky as the chefs navigate their first team challenge – and one chef makes a potentially fatal shopping error. Can they recover or will they be scraping the bottom of the barrel to make it through? Food and travel editor, Nilou Motamed joins the judges this season, and Maker’s Mark’s in-house Chef, Newman Miller, sits on the panel as a guest judge.

programme.desc: Lauro kicks Iditarod training into high gear with a 300-mile run on the Denali Highway; Bret and Ivy go from checking traps to hunting moose and take the opportunity to bring down a large bull.

programme.desc: Optimism abounds when the Fellowship returns to Smith's Cove and finds evidence of work that could finally uncover the legendary flood tunnels and lead them directly to the Money Pit.

programme.desc: Welcome spring on the Gomoti River, where cheetah mum Phefo and lion mum Tshaba teach their cubs survival skills and keep them out of the jaws of the big male cats. See lion king Molelo go into battle while leopard Senatia tries to ensure his legacy.

programme.desc: Welcome spring on the Gomoti River, where cheetah mum Phefo and lion mum Tshaba teach their cubs survival skills and keep them out of the jaws of the big male cats. See lion king Molelo go into battle while leopard Senatia tries to ensure his legacy.

programme.title: E5 - A Turtle's Legacy
programme.desc: The sea turtle is one of the oldest animals on earth. These ancient mariners even pre-date the dinosaurs. They have existed, relatively unchanged, for over 100 million years. But now, all seven of the surviving species are endangered.

programme.title: E5 - Cat Country
programme.desc: Join a group of wildlife scientists tracking the comeback of the ocelot in the Pantanal. Check in on their network of trail cameras, which capture the movements of this elusive spotted cat, and see the perils it faces, including giant anacondas.

programme.title: E14 - 沈騰安宇對唱全是技巧
programme.desc: 出發團老成員沈騰、白敬亭、金晨、賈冰、胡先煦、王安宇、范丞丞攜手再次奔赴自然秘境，沉浸式領略各地的美麗風景；以「金木水火土」為主題線索，踏上野外探險之旅，將旅行與挑戰深度綁定，足跡從西藏林芝、齊齊哈爾等國內秘境延伸至海外極端環境。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E21 - 年度盛典 (上)
programme.desc: 將繼續以「音樂牽線，緣分發聲」為主題，賽制上進行了全面創新升級，帶來更具懸念的緣分匹配設定、更多元的趣味互動模式，以及更動人的團隊默契考驗；匯聚周深、薛之謙、單依純等10位實力歌手與新銳音樂人，通過盲選歌單、即興創作等環碰撞靈感，打造專屬合作舞台！

programme.title: E14 - 沈騰安宇對唱全是技巧
programme.desc: 出發團老成員沈騰、白敬亭、金晨、賈冰、胡先煦、王安宇、范丞丞攜手再次奔赴自然秘境，沉浸式領略各地的美麗風景；以「金木水火土」為主題線索，踏上野外探險之旅，將旅行與挑戰深度綁定，足跡從西藏林芝、齊齊哈爾等國內秘境延伸至海外極端環境。

programme.title: Executive Decision
programme.desc: In a chillingly prescient story, 400 terrified passengers face death on a plane hijacked by terrorists. In a daring rescue attempt, an elite military unit boards the plane ... but as they hurtle toward Washington, D.C., the president must decide whether to destroy the plane or allow the heroes time to overpower the terrorists.
